text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, right in the middle of our time at
summer camp, I bump into Mejiro Ardan standing
around having a chat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh hello, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh! You're Ardan's trainer! Like, how's it going?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's Mejiro Palmer. She's a cheerful
Umamusume with explosive breakaway speed.
She's also a member of the Mejiro family, and I
hear she talks with Mejiro Ardan all the time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah! You know that thing we were talking about just now? You should totally ask your trainer about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I should!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Since we're all going to be off tomorrow, we were
talking about getting the Mejiros together for a
day by the sea.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ardan was saying she hasn't really gotten to play
at the beach much before, so we were all gonna
hit the public beach together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However, the camp supervisors said that a
chaperone would be necessary if were planning a
group excursion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If you happen to be free as well, Trainer, would
you mind accompanying us? As a guardian of
sorts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. Well then, I shall see you
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so here I am at the beachfront with Ardan
and the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Simply seeing the shack stirs so many
emotions. My heart's pounding already.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha! That's, like, such an Ardan thing to say.
Okay, first, how about we sit down and eat?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's do that. Where's everyone going to—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh! What a stunning lineup of shaved ice. You
can really sense the passion of the staff who
arranged it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: For sure. Strawberry milk, matcha, mango, ramune... They've got the basics covered and they've got some out-there options to boot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What flavor are you getting, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
With this many options, I can't make my mind
up... Which will you be going with, Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm going with this one! Chocolate protein shaved
ice!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I might have known you'd choose that
flavor, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Have a look at this "Sweet Memory" juice,
Dober. Isn't it adorable how the straw's shaped
like a heart?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I do find it strange that this straw has two heads,
though. How do you suppose one's supposed to
drink from it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Let's just say that it's, um... it's not really for us,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Whyever not? If you know, I'd love if you'd
enlighten me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What?! Um, well... it's designed that way so two
people who are... uh, close... can drink from it
together...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That sounds perfect for us, then! We are close,
after all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That's not what I meant! Ughhh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Some things never change.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's wonderful to see everyone enjoying
themselves.
Shall we follow suit?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I must say, though... the sheer variety of food
available at the snack shack is truly remarkable.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Meh, there are fancier tiki bars out there with, like, a more mature vibe, but this one's definitely giving the classic beach feel, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now that we're looking at the menu, my eyes
can't help but dart from one dish to another. It
feels as though I'm exploring uncharted territory...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, how about this? "Flaming Spice vs. Extreme Tongue Tingles"! OMG, that sounds so fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And it's only available this summer? ...It sounds
like a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Wonderful.
I think I shall go with this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan and Mejiro Palmer are looking over
the special menu... but every dish displayed is a
vibrant red!
choice_data_list: It all looks incredibly spicy. Are you sure?
It all looks incredibly spicy. Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's all part of the experience. You needn't be
concerned. I'm quite confident I'll be able to
finish whatever I'm served.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, my mind's pretty much made up. How
about you, Ardan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well... I've narrowed it down to two possibilities,
but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Given this is something of a special occasion,
Trainer, I think I'd like you to make the decision
for me. Would you mind?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Mejiro Ardan gestures toward the
menu.
choice_data_list:
"Punch of Power: Flamin' Hot Mapo Tofu &
Beef."
"No Guts, No Glory: Tan Tan Noodle Inferno."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Very well... One "Punch of Power: Flamin' Hot
Mapo Tofu & Beef" please.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: PFFF! Haha! You can't just read the whole name off the menu like that, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Order up! Here's your Punch of Power special!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A bowl of what looks to be freshly ladled lava is
placed in front of Mejiro Ardan. Just looking at
the dish has me sweating up a storm! Mejiro
Ardan, however...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Such vivid coloration, and so intense an
aroma. Well, without further ado.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan downs the bowl without batting an
eye—though I do spot a bead of sweat on her
brow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wheeew! Now that had some kick! But it was a good kick, amirite?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. The first bite caught me off guard, but
there was real depth to the spice and an
abundance of flavor to it. Delicious.
choice_data_list: So you're good with spicy food, huh?
So you're good with spicy food, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
While I'm not sure whether I'm "good" with spice...
I am quite confident in my ability to withstand
shocks to the body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's due to the number of opportunities I
had to ingest bitter things during my childhood?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Geez, Ardan, if this was a tolerance contest,
you'd be unstoppable. None of us other Mejiros
would stand a chance!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
A tolerance contest! ...I'd love the opportunity to
enter such a competition!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If the occasion were to arise, perhaps you'd care
to join me, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Yeah, so I could make sure you don't overdo it.
Yeah, so I could make sure you don't overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Haha! I can totally see that, lol!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. With my track record, I'm afraid I can't
deny the possibility. I'll have to ask for your
guidance, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We go on shooting the breeze and enjoying
ourselves, and I come away sure that today will
become another summer memory shared with
Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Very well... One "No Guts, No Glory: Tan Tan
Noodle Inferno" please.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: PFFF! Haha! You can't just read the whole name off the menu like that, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Order up! Here's your No Guts, No Glory special!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A bowl of what looks to be a scorching hot mass
of flavor is placed in front of Mejiro Ardan. The
smell alone has me sweating up a storm! Mejiro
Ardan, however...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Such an appetite-inducing aroma. Well,
without further ado.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan downs the bowl without batting an
eye—though I do spot a bead of sweat on her
brow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wheeew! Now that had some kick! But it was a good kick, amirite?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. The first bite caught me off guard, but
there was real depth to the spice and an
abundance of flavor to it. Delicious.
choice_data_list: So you're good with spicy food, huh?
So you're good with spicy food, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
While I'm not sure whether I'm "good" with spice...
I am quite confident in my ability to withstand
shocks to the body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's due to the number of opportunities I
had to ingest bitter things during my childhood?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You know something, Ardan? You've got, like,
nerves of steel! Trying out new stuff doesn't faze
you one bit. It's like you're always game to just
jump right in, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Does it seem that way? I can't say I'm making a
conscious effort to think that way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I suppose I may have a "now or never"
mentality, though. I always feel like I would regret
letting opportunities slip by.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: In that case, we've totally gotta have the best beach day ever! Then you'll literally have, like, no regrets!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Quite right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yo, Ardan! Palmer! You guys want some ice
cream? They let you put whatever fruits you want
on top!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: For real? That sounds so good! Let's go, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Come along, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We eat to our hearts' content, and I come away
sure that today will become another summer
memory shared with Mejiro Ardan.
